New · Email & SMS outreach in one place

Capture leads. Convert customers.

Built for agencies, SaaS teams, and growing local businesses.

LeadFlow helps you collect, organize, and reach out to leads via email and SMS. Stop losing potential customers and start growing your business.

2,500+ businesses

app.leadflow.io · Dashboard overview

Everything you need to grow

LeadFlow combines lead management, email marketing, and SMS outreach in one powerful platform.

Smart Lead Capture

Create beautiful forms and landing pages to capture leads from anywhere. Embed them on your website or share direct links.

Email Campaigns

Design and send personalized email campaigns to your leads. Track opens, clicks, and conversions in real-time.

SMS Outreach

Reach leads instantly with SMS messages. Perfect for time-sensitive offers and appointment reminders.

Powerful Analytics

Get insights into your lead pipeline. See which campaigns perform best and optimize your outreach strategy.

Lead Tagging & Scoring

Organize leads with custom tags and scores. Focus on the most promising prospects automatically.

Easy Import/Export

Import existing leads from CSV files or export your data anytime. Your leads, your control.

Automation

Set up automated sequences to nurture leads without lifting a finger. Save time, close more deals.

Enterprise Security

Your data is protected with bank-grade encryption. GDPR compliant with full audit trails.

How LeadFlow works

From capture to conversion in four simple steps.

01

Capture Leads

Create custom forms or import existing leads. Connect your website, landing pages, or social media.

02

Organize & Segment

Tag, score, and segment your leads automatically. Keep your pipeline clean and actionable.

03

Send Campaigns

Reach out via email or SMS. Use templates or create custom messages. Schedule for the perfect time.

04

Track & Optimize

Monitor opens, clicks, and conversions. A/B test your campaigns and continuously improve.

Simple, transparent pricing

Choose the plan that fits your business. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

Free

Perfect for getting started

  • 50 emails/mo
  • 20 WhatsApp msgs/mo
  • Up to 100 leads/month
  • 50 emails/month
  • 20 WhatsApp messages/month

  • 150 WhatsApp msgs/mo
  • Up to 1,000 leads/month
  • 300 emails/month
  • 150 WhatsApp messages/month
